prompting.responds_best_to: Tightly scoped, single-purpose tasks with an explicit output format.
prompting.avoid: Multi-step reasoning chains or open-ended prompts — decompose first.
prompting.system_prompt_prefix: Be concise and return only the requested output in the specified format.

quirks: Good cheap workhorse for fan-out subtasks within the OpenAI stack
Loses coherence on long or multi-part tasks — decompose

handoff.output_format_instruction: Demand strict format and supply one example.
handoff.evaluation_notes: Verify completeness; re-route to GPT-5 or Sonnet if the task turned out to need reasoning.
